title: I'm Possessed!
overview: A series of mysterious attacks leave several young women drained of their energy. Meanwhile, Matoi and Yuma work the shrine with no idea of the danger looming over them.

title: I Clad Myself In A God
overview: An invisible apparition is following Matoi wherever she goes, even to school. When photos of her other form land on the internet, other parties descend on her location.

title: God's Playing Dumb
overview: Luciela somehow works her way into the shrine and becomes Matoi and Yuma’s new tutor. Meanwhile, a sinister force takes over a human vessel and prepares another attack.

title: Her Resolution and My Reason
overview: Clarus burns for revenge against the “Creed Killer,” and she needs Matoi to lure him out. In exchange, she tells Matoi more about her powers and the nature of their enemy.

title: A Special Kind of Ordinary
overview: Matoi and Yuma take Clarus shopping, but the jovial atmosphere is broken when two little gods are released from inside Yuma and quickly scurry away.

title: I'm Sorry
overview: Yuma’s frightened tanuki god, Kai, is not nearly as excited as she is about combat, but he and Yuma might be their only hope when a fight against a cute Night turns deadly.

title: The Sea, the Hot Springs, and Sometimes Evil Spirits
overview: The whole gang ends up at the beach as a day for relaxation. When everyone goes to sleep, chaos ensues.

title: A Small Wish
overview: Tension arises with Matoi as she becomes uncertain of herself. Meanwhile, Tezuka is suddenly attacked.

title: Thank You
overview: After an attack by a Night, Shingo and Matoi end up trapped alone together, and Matoi’s transformation is starting to disappear. Is Shingo going to discover her identity?

title: The Open Gate
overview: At last, it’s time for Matoi to learn about her mother’s past. Meanwhile, Ludos launches another attack on the exorcists, but his orders may not be coming from who he expects.

title: I'm Heading Out!
overview: Matoi prepares to save the world by saying goodbye to the people she cares about. Meanwhile, Shingo realizes he might lose Matoi to the same calamity that took his wife.

title: Being Ordinary's the Best
overview: The girls ascend to the highest dimension and try to seal the gate. Matoi only holds one wish in her heart: to be ordinary.
